title: Lungleiah leh Lungsenah WCD DHEW huaihawtin Nu Chhuanawm Chawimawina hun hman a ni
content:
629/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 20:Mother's Day, 2026 lawm nan Lunglei District Hub for Empowerment of Women (DHEW), Women & Child Development (WCD) te huaihawtin vawiin khan Lungleiah leh Lungsenah a vawi khat nan "Nu Chhuanawm Chawimawina" hun hman a ni a. Lunglei District aṭanga fate enkawl puitlinna kawnga nu chhuanawm pahnih – Pi ZD Ramhmingthangi (Electric Veng, Lunglei) leh Pi P. Malsawmtluangi (Lungsen) te hnenah thuziak (citation) leh pawisa fai ₹5,000/- ve ve hlan a ni.

Lunglei Additional Deputy Commissioner Pindana Nu Chhuanawm Chawimawina hun hmanah Addl DC Pi Rochuangkimi Khenglawt chuan Pi ZD Ramhmingthangi (Electric Veng, Lunglei) hnenah chawimawina hi a hlan a. Chawimawina dawngtute chu chhuanawm a tih thu sawiin, anmahni chawimawina hun buatsaih nachang an hriat avangin WCD Department hnenah lawm thu a sawi nghal a. Nu chhuanawm chawimawina hlante chu nute leh hmeichhia zawng zawngin entawn se a duh thu sawiin, anmahni anga fate enkawl puitlin leh nun kawng dika kaihhruai kawngah nute'n ṭan la thar ṭheuh se ramin hma a sawnin, a nawm phah ngei ang, a ti.

'Nu Chhuanawm Chawimawina' hun hi Lungsen Block Development Office-ah buatsaih ni bawkin, BDO Pu Lalhruailiana Zote chuan Pi P. Malsawmtluangi (Lungsen) hnenah chawimawina hi a hlan.

Lungleia hun hman hi Lunglei District Programme Officer (WCD) Pu R. Lalnunpuia'n kaihruaiin, Mother's Day hman chhan leh 'Nu Chhuanawm Chawimawina' dawngtute chanchin tlangpui a sawi a. Lungsena hun hman hi Lungsen Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) Pu Vanlalsanga'n a kaihruai thung.

Pi ZD Ramhmingthangi (Kum 64) hi Thehlep khuaa piang leh seilian a ni a. Fa pathum – C. Lalrammawia (Kum 36), C. Lalrinawma (Kum 34) leh Lalhmunmawia Chawngthu (Kum 31) te a nei a. A pasal Pu C. Chawnghmingthanga chuan kum 2000 khan a boralsan a; a boral lai hian an fa naupang ber chu kum 5 mi niin, a upa ber kum 10 mi a ni thung. A pasal boral hnu hian Lungleiah awm nghalin, ni tin ei chawp dapin, mi ṭhutna dil chawpin hawker-ah a ṭhu ṭhin a. A fate hi chuti ang chuan harsa tak chungin a enkawl a ni.

Pi ZD Ramhmingthangi fapa upa ber C. Lalrammawia hi MBBS niin, tunah Civil Hospital Aizawl leh LRM Hospital-ah a thawk mek a. A fa lai C. Lalrinawma hian Mizoram Polytechnic Lunglei aṭangin Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering zovin, chumi hnuah NE-3-ah inziak tlingin, NERIST Arunachal Pradesh-ah B.Tech a zir leh a. Chumi hnuah GATE-ah inziak tlingin, NIT Tripura aṭangin M.Tech a zo leh a. Tunah hian MZU-ah Ph.D zir leh mekin, kum 3-na a kal mek a. A naupang ber Lalhmunmawia Chawngthu chuan B.Com a zawh hnuah a nu hna thawhpuiin, sumdawnna lamah a kal zui ve bawk.

Pi P. Malsawmtluangi (Kum 50) hian kum 2012 khan pasal a lo sun tawh a. A pasal Pu C. Lalhriatpuia nen hian fanu pakhat leh fapa 2 an nei a, a unaute fa mipa 2 a awmpui bawk a. A pasalin a thihsan lai hian an fate hi pawl 5 hnuai lam vek an la ni.

Pi P. Malsawmtluangi hian a pa Middle School Peon pension chu chhawmin, a fate enkawl nan a innghahna ber a ni a. Ran vulh leh rawra chhu te'n a inhlawh ṭhin bakah, inhlawhna remchang a hmuh ang angah a thawk ṭhin a. National Highway–302 laih avanga zangnadawmna an lak chuan a fate enkawlna kawngah a pui nasa hle bawk.

Pi P. Malsawmtluangi fate chu – C. Lalhungchhungi (BA), C. Lalnunsiama (BA) leh C. Lalramnghinglova (MBBS 2nd year at ZMC) te niin, a u fa a enkawlte chu – C. Lalrindika leh Jacob Ramdinpuia (BCA) te an ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION KALPUI DAN TUR SAWIHO A NI
content:
628/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 20thMay, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana, District Election Officer (DEO) ni bawk kaihhruaiin Khawzawl district chhunga Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui dan tur sawihona thutkhawm neih a ni a, Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana, Deputy DEO ni bawk leh SP Pu F. Lalbiakzauva te an tel a ni.

Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan electoral roll revision hi langtlang taka kalpui a pawimawh thu sawiin, field level-a thawktu turte theihtawp chhuah turin a fuih a. SIR hna hi a hautak em avangin Booth level officer-te chu Booth Level Agent leh NGO-te pawhin theih ang anga lo pui turin a chah bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Election Officer Pu Timothy R. Lalhmangaiha chuan SIR chungchang leh a tangkainate, SIR 2026 schedule leh kalpui dan tur te, Enumeration form chungchangte, ERO, AERO leh BLO mawhphurhna te a tarlang a ni.

SIR 2026-a tihtur leh ni pawimawh te:

1. Qualifying date of SIR - 01.07.2026 a kum tling chin2. House to House Visit by BLOs - 30.05.2026 to 28.06.2026

3. Publication of Draft Electoral Roll - 05.07.2026

4. Period of filing Claims & Objections - 05.07.2026  to 04.08.2026

5. Notice Phase/Disposal of  Claims & Objections - 05.07.2026 to 02.09.2026

6. Publication of Final Electoral Roll - 06.09.2026

Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui dan tur tlangpui te:

Ni 01.07.1987 hma lama India-a piang tan

•    A hnuaia list atang hian document eng pawh mahni pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

India ramah Ni. 01.07.0978 leh 02.12.2004 inkara piang

•    A hnuaia list atang hian mahni document eng pawh pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur thehluh tur

•    A hnuaia list atang hian nu emaw pa emaw document eng pawh pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thlang rawh

Ni. 02.12.2004 hnu lamah India rama piang

•    A hnuaia list atang hian mahni document eng pawh, pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

•    A hnuaia list atang hian document eng pawh, mahni pa pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

•    A hnuaia list atang hian document eng pawh, mahni nu pianni emaw pianna hmun tih chianna tur document thehluh tur

•    Nu emaw Pa emaw Indian an nih loh chuan i pian laia an Passport copy thehluh tur

India ram pawna piang tan (Ram pawna India Mission-in Birth Registration a pek chhuah finfiahna thiltel tur)

Registration/Naturalization hmangin India khua leh tui nihna nei tan. (Certificate of Registration of Citizenship thehluh tur)

Document thehluh theih te –

i.    Central/State Sorkar/PSU eng pawha regular employee/pensioner hnena Identity

ii.    Card/Pension Payment Order pek chhuah apiang.

iii.    Sawrkar hnuaia Bank/Post Office/LIC/PSU ten 01.07.1987 hmaa Identity Card emaw

iv.    Certificate emaw Document emaw an pek chhuah

v.    Thuneitute hnen atanga Birth Certificate pek chhuah

vi.    Indian Passport

vii.    Board/University pawrnpui Matriculation/Educational certificate

viii.    Permanent Residence Certificate state thuneitute hnen atanga pek chhuah

ix.    Forest Right Certificate

x.    OBC/SC/ST certificate emaw thuneituten an pek chhuah caste certificate eng pawh

xi.    National Registration of Citizens (a awmna apiangah)

xii.    Family Register, State/TuaIchhungthuneitute buatsaih

xiii.   Sawrkar-in ram/in a pekna certificate eng pawh

xiv.    Aadhaar card (citizenship proof nan ni lovin mahni identity tih chian nan chauh hman theih a ni)

Special Intensive Revision chungchang zawhfiah duh nei tan Helpline number – 9612282447 ah office kai hun chhungin (office hour) a biak theih a ni.

title: PADMA  AWARDS DAWNG TUR RAWT DUH NEITE TANA HRIATTIRNA.
content:
627/2026-2027

Siaha the 20th May 2026:Sawrkar Laipuia Ministry of Home Affairs chuan India rama civil mi te chawimawina sang Padma Awards chi hrang hrang "Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan leh Padma Shri" dawng thei tur a zawng mek a, Siaha atanga heng Award dawng tlak leh dawng thei tur ni a hriat rawt tur nei chuan June Ni 20, 2026 thlengin SDO (S) Office -ah thehluh theih a ni. Online a nomination thehlut duh tan Rashtriya puraskar portalawards.gov.inah thehluh theih a ni a, a copy SDO (S ) hnenah thehluh bawk tur a ni.

Padma Awards dawng tur hian Art, Literature, Education, Sports, Medicine, Social Work, Science & Engineering, Public Affairs, Civil Service, Trade & Industry etc a mi hmingtha te rawt theih a ni a, sawrkar hnathawk leh Public Sector Undertakings a thawkte zingah Doctor leh Scientist te chauh rawt theih an ni thung.

Sawrkar Laipuia Ministry of Home Affairs chuan India rama civil mi te chawimawina sang Padma Awards chi hrang hrang "Padma Vibhushan, Padma Bhushan leh Padma Shri" dawng thei tur a zawng mek a, Siaha atanga heng Award dawng tlak leh dawng thei tur ni a hriat rawt tur nei chuan June Ni 20, 2026 thlengin SDO (S) Office -ah thehluh theih a ni. Online a nomination thehlut duh tan Rashtriya puraskar portalawards.gov.inah thehluh theih a ni a, a copy SDO (S ) hnenah thehluh bawk tur a ni.

Padma Awards dawng tur hian Art, Literature, Education, Sports, Medicine, Social Work, Science & Engineering, Public Affairs, Civil Service, Trade & Industry etc a mi hmingtha te rawt theih a ni a, sawrkar hnathawk leh Public Sector Undertakings a thawkte zingah Doctor leh Scientist te chauh rawt theih an ni thung.

Padma Award dawng tura Sawrkar Laipuiin a pawm te chu Republic Day, 2027 ah an hming puan a ni ang.

title: Mizoram Governor Leads Joint Celebration of Foundation Days of Gujarat, Maharashtra, Sikkim and Goa
content:
95/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 20th May, 2026:Under the Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat initiative, Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) today hosted a celebration to mark the Foundation Days of Gujarat, Maharashtra, Sikkim and Goa at the Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan in Aizawl.

In his address, Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) spoke about the Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat initiative, launched under the leadership of Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi. He said the programme is regularly observed at Lok Bhavan and Lok Niwas to promote national integration. The Governor noted that India is a land of immense diversity and that even a single state contains a wide variety of cultures, traditions and lifestyles.

The Governor described diversity as the country’s unique strength and a source of national unity and pride. “Each part of our country has its own unique beauty,” he added. The Governor commended the cultural performances presented during the event and congratulated all those involved for contributing to its success. He expressed hope that such programmes would help foster greater understanding and appreciation of India’s rich cultural heritage.

The event featured messages from Gujarat Governor Shri Acharya Devvrat, Maharashtra Governor Shri Jishnu Dev Varma, Sikkim Governor Shri Om Prakash Mathur and Goa Governor Shri Pusapati Ashok Gajapathi Raju. It also included informative and visually captivating short videos showcasing the cultural heritage and scenic landscapes of the respective states. Students from the College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry and Government Mizo Higher Secondary School enthralled the audience with their vibrant and impressive cultural performances, adding colour and energy to the programme. Following the main event, the Governor hosted the participants for a cordial gathering and refreshments at the Upper Lawn of Lok Bhavan.

Gujarat and Maharashtra attained statehood on 1st May 1960. Sikkim became a full-fledged state on 16th May 1975, while Goa achieved statehood on 30th May 1987.

Attachment

title: Mizoram Larsap hovin Gujarat, Maharashtra, Sikkim leh Goa-te dinchamphaphak lawm
content:
626/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 20th May, 2026: Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat hmalakna hnuaiah Mizoram Larsap, General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) hovin vawiin khan Gujarat, Maharashtra, Sikkim leh Goa-te state puitlinga hlankai ni 'Foundation Day' lawmna chu Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah neih a ni.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan Prime Minister Pu Narendra Modi hmalakna hnuaia hnam inpumkhatna programme 'Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat' chu Lok Bhavan leh Lok Niwas hrang hrangahte hman thin a nih thu a sawi a. India rama chengte zingah hnam ziarang, nunphung, ei leh in, incheina leh a dangahte inanlohna nasa tak a awm thu leh state pakhat chhungah ngei pawh hmuh theiha a awm thu sawiin, he kan inanlohna hi India danglam bikna, ropuina leh chakna a ni, a ti a. State palite chanchin danglam bikte sawiin, India ram state hrang hrangte hian mawina bik an nei theuh a ni, a ti a. Programme hlawhtlin theih nana hnam lam leh zai entirtute fakam tiin, hun hman chuan India ram hriat chian lehzual kawngah kalkhawmte a puih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Gujarat Larsap Pu Acharya Devvrat, Maharastra Larsap Pu Jishnu Dev Varma, Sikkim Larsap Pu Om Prakash Mathur leh Goa Larsap Pu Pusapati Ashok Gajapathi Raju te thuchah bakah state hrang hrangte chanchin tarlanna video tawi hmuhnawm tak tak thlir ho a ni a. College of Veterinary Sciences & Animal Husbandry leh Government Mizo Higher Secondary School zirlaite'n hnam lam leh zai mawi tak tak an entir a. Hemi hnu hian Larsap chuan hemi puala kalkhawmte hi Upper Lawn, Lok Bhavan-ah kawmin hun hlimawm tak an hmang ho a ni.

Gujarat leh Maharashtra-te hi May ni 1, 1960 khan state-ah hlankai an ni a. Sikkim hi May ni 16, 1975 khan state puitlinga hlankai niin, Goa hi May ni 30, 1987 khan state puitlinga hlankai a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah district hmasawnna atana culture leh tourism kawnga hmalak dan tha sawiho
content:
625/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 20th of May,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Mamit district-a culture leh tourism changtlung zawka kalpui dan tha leh hmalak dan tur chu Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hoa sawi a ni.

District Bawrhsap chuan Mamit district-a tourism lama theihna(potential)neih that te chu a lem nen (ppt) sawi zauna hun a hmang a, heng hmunte hi changtlung zawka kan kalpui chuan district dang mai nilo India ram hmun hrang hrang atangin tlawhtu kan nei anga, district hmasawna leh chawikanna atan kawng pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi. Department bakah NGO leh mipuite chu hemi kawnga kan tan tlan a ngai a, kan thil hlu neih te thuamthaa district tlawh chakawm nih theihnan hma kan lak that a ngai a ni a ti.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Sawrkar department hotute bakah NGO, pawl hrang hrang leh khawtlang hruaitute an tel a, hmalak ngaihna te an sawi ho.

Attachment

title: MINISTER Prof. LALNILAWMA'N GOVT. SAITUAL HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL-a zirlai pass tharte a lawmpui
content:
624/2026-2027

Saitual, the 20th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Govt. Saitual Higher Secondary School Building-ah Prof. Lalnilawma, Minister of State, RD, PHE, etc chuan Govt. Saitual Higher Secondary School-a zirlai pass tharte hnenah lawmpuina a hlan.

He hunah hian Prof. Lalnilawma chuan zirlai pass thar zawng zawngte chu thinlung taka a lawmpui thu a sawi a, class 12 pass hnuah hma lam hun tak tak a intan chho dawn a ni, a ti. Minister chuan nu leh pate leh zirtirtute zara hlawhtlinna chang an ni tih hre thar leh turin zirlaite chu a chah a, an thil tih apiangah theih tawp chhuah turin a fuih bawk a ni.

Prof. Lalnilawma chuan harsatna atanga chhel taka nun zir chho turin leh rual elna tisang zel turin zirlaite chu a fuih a, ni khatah darker 24 theuh kan neih thu tarlangin, a hmang thiam apiangin hlawhtlinna an chang dawn a ni tih a sawi. Minister chuan a bial mipuite tan zirna kawngah theih tawp chhuah a inhuam thu a sawi a, zirlaite chu an kal lehzelna turah hlawhtlinna an chan theih nan a duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Govt. Saitual Higher Secondary School-ah hian Arts stream-ah zirlai naupang 56 awmin 51 an pass a, pass percentage hi 91.07% a ni. Science stream-ah hian zirlai naupang 24 awmin,  18 an pass a, pass percentage hi 75% a ni.Commerce stream-ah hian zirlai naupang 19 awmin 18 an pass a, pass percentage hi 94.73% a ni.

Vawiin inkhawmah hian Pu Laldailova, UDC chuan hunserh a hmang a, Pu VL. Felfamkima, Principal, Govt. Saitual Higher Secondary School chuan inlawmna thu sawiin, khuallian Minister Prof. Lalnilawma, Pu K. Lalhriata, Lecturer leh sawm bikte hnen atangin thusawi ngaihthlak a ni bawk. Lawmpuina inhlanna hun hi Pu H. Lalhmangaihzuala, Lecturer leh Pi C. Lalbiaknungi, Lecturer ten an kai hruai a, Pu Zohmangaiha Tochhawng, Lecturer in lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: REVENUE MINISTER PU B.LALCHHANZOVA’N DC OFFICE CHEI THAT (RENOVATE) MEK A ENPUI
content:
623/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 20th May 2026 :Vawiin khan Revenue Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan Land Revenue and Settlement Department hnuaia Assistant Commissioner(Revenue) North thuthmun tura duan Aizawl DC Office building chung ber, Treasury Square, chei that (renovate) mek chu a enpui.

Minister chuan Land Revenue and Settlement Department luah tur DC Office building chung ber chei that (renovate) mek chu sak zawh vat a nih theih a beisei thu sawiin, hemi avang hian thawhhona tha leh chak zawk neih chhunzawm zel turin a chah a. Sawrkar ruahmanna thar angin District Revenue office-te hi district tina DC office-ah awm tawh tura ruahman a ni.

Mizoram sawrkar pawhin e-governance chu a ngaihpawimawhzia sawiin, District Revenue Office leh DC Office hnai taka an thawkho thei tur hian digitalisation lama Mizoramin hma a sawn theihna rahbi pawimawh tak a nih a rin thu Pu B. Lalchhanzova chuan a sawi a. Kum hnih thum hnuah chuan 100 percent-in files te pawh digitised a nih ngei a beisei tih a sawi bawk.

Vawiinah hian Minister hi Land Revenue and Settlement Department Commissioner & Secretary Pu Vanlalmawia chuan tawiawmin, Aizawl District Commissioner (DC) Er. Lalhriatpuia chuan a lo dawngsawng a, DC office thawkte leh LR&S office-a thawk hote nen hian building chei that (renovate) mek chu an enho a ni. Celing beam thlakte, pindan siam belh leh chei that te, lawiluhna awlsam zawk siam leh hna dang dang te he renovation hnathawh hian a keng tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lunglei District Bawrhsapin NH–54 & 302 kawngpui zauh leh siam ṭhat hna thawh meka hmasawn dan a hmunah a enfiah
content:
622/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭomir thla ni 20:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan National Highway–54 & 302 kawngpui laih zauh leh siam ṭhat hna thawh meka Theiriat–Hrangchalkawn, Lungpuizawl–Zobawk leh Sazaikawn–Hauruang huam chhunga hma lakna hrang hranga hmasawn dan leh hmachhawp awmte chu a hmunah kal chilhin a enfiah.

Bawrhsap hi DDMA Zonal Officer-te, DC, I&PR leh Revenue official-te, kawng siam mek enkawltu NHIDCL (National Highways & Infrastructure Development Corporation Limited) leh hna thawktu contractor BRN Infrastructure Private Ltd te'n an ṭawiawm a. Hna kal meka hmasawnna awm dan en hovin, hma lak zel dan tur leh harsatna hrang hrang chin fel dan tur te an sawi ho.

Aizawl–Tuipang NH–54-ah hian Zobawk leh Lungpuizawlah hna thawh mek awmin, kawng laih zauh, lung rem siam, kawng chhuat siam rem leh kawng luan hna te thawh mek a ni a. Lunglei –Tlabung NH–302 hna thawh kal mekah Hrangchalkawn aṭanga Mizoram Polytechnic Lunglei panna kawng (approach road) siam mek te, Theiriata T-Way Filling Station bul lei minna lai lung rem leh kawng luan mek te, Sazaikawn leh Hauruang inkara hna thawh mekte en dik a ni bawk a. Hna thawh danah hma lakna leh hmasawnna hrang hrang hmuh niin, hmun ṭhenkhat erawh chak lehzuala hma lak ṭul tih a ni a. Bawrhsap chuan fur laia mipuiin harsatna an tawh lohna tur leh chhiatna thleng thei pumpelh nan contractor-te chu chak zawka hma la tura hrilhin, fur hmaa kawng an luan hman loh turte pawh ṭha taka enkawl leh thawm ṭhat hna thawk turin a chah.

Attachment

title: Champhaia CM Special Package Progress Partner thlan chhuah 3 te'n training kal
content:
621/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 20th May 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall-ah Addl. Deputy Commissioner Pu Lalbiakfela kaihhruainain Champhai District a Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme hnuaia Chief Minister's Special Package dawngtu Progress Partner thlan chhuah pathum (3) - Pu Biaksiama (Kelkang), Pu B. Vanlalhmingsanga (Tualcheng) leh Pu Chinlamthanga (Ngur), te chu placard leh certificates hlan an ni. Heng progress partner te hian training hi mahni department ah theuh an lo nei tawh a, training an zo tih hriatpuina leh lawmpuina a ni.

Attachment

title: Special Intensive Revision,2026 Phase III kalpui dan tur chungchangah Mamit District Level Standing Committee thukhawm
content:
620/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 20th of May, 2026: Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Election Commission of India hmalakna Special Intensive Revision-Phase III kalpui meka hriattur pawimawh chu District Level Standing Committee hoa sawi niin Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Election Officer chuan thutkhawm a kaihruai.

District Bawrhsap chuan he hmalakna kalpui mek hi a pawimawh a hotuten uluk leh fel taka kan kalpui a tul a, documents pawimawh te him taka enkawl leh ngaihven turin a chah a ni. Pu Suvigya S Chandra chuan he hmalaknaa mawhphurtute chuan ECI ina hun tiam a pek te chu ngaipawimawha harsatna an neih chuan Election Office hnena thlen hreh lo turin a chah bawk.

Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, Election Officer chuan SIR neih hnunhnun ber chu 2005 a nih thu sawiin 2005-a Electoral Roll-a chuang tawh te chu Booth Level Officer (BLO) ten thlunzawm hna an thawk mek a,kum 2005 hnulama Electoral Roll-a lut te pawh an nu leh pa emaw pi leh pu te hmangin thlunzawm an ni bawk tih a tarlang.

Election officer chuan SIR chungchanga hriattur pawimawh hrang hrang sawifiahna hun a hmang a, chungte chu:

1. Special Intensive Revision chu Electoral Roll dik leh felfai siam tur a Election Commission of India hmalakna a ni a. India khua leh tui dik tak, kum tling chin in vote an neih theihna tur a beihpui thlakna a ni. SIR, 2026-ah hian Electoral Roll thar hlak buatsaih a nih dawn avangin vote nei tawh zawng zawng inthun thar a ngai.

2. SIR Phase-III neih mekah hian ni 01.10.2025-a kum 18 tling chin electoral roll-a chuangte chu Enumeration Form print sak vek an ni. He Enumeration Form hi ni 30.05.2026 - 28.06.2026 chhungin BLO ten an sem vek ang a, Elector ten dahkhah ngai lai te an dahkhah hnuah BLO in a lakhawm leh vek ang.

3. SIR Phase-III neih mekah hian ni 01.10.2025-a kum 18 tling chin electoral roll-a chuangte chu Enumeration Form print sak vek an ni. He Enumeration Form hi ni 30.05.2026 - 28.06.2026 chhungin BLO ten an sem vek ang a, Elector ten dahkhah ngai lai te an dahkhah hnuah BLO in a lakhawm leh vek ang.

4. He Enumeration Form dahkhah hnua BLO te hnena thehlut te chauh hi Draft Electoral Roll ah an hming a chuang ang. Enumeration Form rual hian document engmah thil tel a ngai lo.

5. Electoral Roll-a awm tawh sa pawh ni mah se, Enumeration Form dahkhah BLO hnena a thehluh loh chuan Draft Electoral Roll-ah a hming a chuang ve lo ang a, Electoral Roll-a hming chuang tur chuan Claims & Objections hun chhungin (05.07.2026- 04.08.2026) Form-6 leh Declaration Form hmangin a thar in a bialtu Electoral Registration Officer hnenah dilna a siam a ngai dawn a ni. Draft Roll hi 5.07.2026 ah tarchhuah (publish) a ni ang.

6. Enumeration Form hi mahniin Voter Service Portalvoters.eci.gov.inatangin thehluh theih a ni bawk.

7. SIR ah hian ni 01.07.2026-a kum-18 tling chin ten Form-6 leh Declaration Form hmangin ERO hnenah BLO kaltlangin dilna thehluh theih a ni a, siamthat ngai (Correction) leh insawn (Shifting) dil duh chuan Form-8 leh Declaration Form hmangin dilna an thehlut thei bawk ang. Paih ngai (Delete) tur te chu Form-7 hmanga thehluh tur a ni. Hemi rual hian proof documents (Annexure) ami ang hian thil tel tur a ni. Dilna te hi Voter Service Portalvoters.eci.gov.inatangin thehluh theih a ni bawk

8. Dilna lut te hi ni 05.07.2026 - 02.09.2026 chhungin ERO ten an chingfel ang.

9. 10. Final Electoral Roll hi ni 06.09.2026 ah tarchhuah (publish) tur a ni ang.

10. Political Party te nen thawhhona tha leh changtlung zawk kan neih theih nan, Mamit District huam chhunga Recognized Political Parties - BJP, INC, MNF leh ZPM ten polling station zawng zawngah Booth Level Agent ruat vek tur a ngen leh hriattir an ni.

Election Officer SIR Phase III kalpui mekah hian Bialtu BLO te tha taka lo thawhpui tur leh ngaipawimawh turin political party,NGO leh mipuite chu a ngen a. 2005 electoral roll leh tun electoral roll a awm thlunzawm hna chu Mamit district-ah kalpui mek zel a ni a, 90.94% thlunzawm(mapping) tawh niin

Hachhek AC- 88.99%

Dampa AC- 94.69%

Mamit AC - 89.61% te an ni.

Press Note - SIR, 2026 (Mizo) (1).pdf

title: Mamit District chhunga CM Special Package phase - II dawngtute tanpuina hlan
content:
619/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 20th of May, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Mamit District chhunga Chief Minister's Special Package Phase - II dawngtu (Progress Partner) te hnenah Pu Suvigya S Chandra, IAS District Bawrhsap chuan tanpuina a hlan.

Pu Suvigya S Chandra chuan Mizoram sawrkarin mi harsa zawkte chawikanna atana flagship programme a duan Bana Kaih hnuaia CM Special Package dawngtute a lawmpui thu sawiin, tanpuina chu a nihna tur ang taka kan hman hi kan tih tur a ni a,an sum dawnte hmasawnnana hmang turin a chah a ni.

He hun hi Pu Lalnunfela Chawngthu, SDO (S) chuan kaihruai a,Pu K Lalthanzama, ZPM Mamit Central Block Organiser chuan thu sawiin Pi Lalrammuani Hnamte, SDC lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Vawiina Chief Minister's Special Package dawngtute hi Commerce & Industries Department hnuaiah mi pahnih leh Social Welfare Department hnuaiah mi pahnih an ni.

Attachment

title: LOK SABHA MP PU RICHARD VANLALHMANGAIHA HOVIN CHAMPHAIAH DISTRICT DEVELOPMENT COORDINATION & MONITORING COMMITTEE (DISHA) MEETING NEIH A NI
content:
618/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 20th May 2026:Vawiin khan District Development Coordination & Monitoring Committee (DISHA) meeting chu Mizoram Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha, DISHA Chairman hovin DC Conference Hall-ah neih a ni a, he hun hi Addl. DC Pu Lalbiakfela'n a kaihruai.

Lok Sabha MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan thu sawiin, Department hrang hrang hnathawh leh hmalaknate chu tha a tih thu sawiin, district tana an inpekna avangin lawmthu a sawi a, scheme leh project an kalpui hrang hrang te a mamawh ber te'n an hlawkpui ngei theih nan duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Head of Office-ten an department theuh hmalaknate PowerPoint presentation hmangin an sawizau a, zawhna awmte an chhang a, hmachhawp an neihte leh harsatna an neihte an sawiho nghal a ni. MP Pu Richard Vanlalhmangaiha chuan an harsatnate sawrkar laipui hotute hnenah a thlensak tur thu sawiin, Scheme hrang hrang hnuaia hamthatna dawngtu turte (beneficiary) uluk taka thlang turin a fuih a. DISHA meeting hnuhnung bera an thu relte bawhzuina dinhmun thlirho a ni bawk.

DISHA hi district hrang hranga sawrkar laipui scheme hmalakna viltu Committee a nih bakah Department hrang hrangte inkara thawhho dan tur ngaihtuah leh thawhhona tha siam tura din a ni a. Vawiinah hian Department hrang hrang - Rural Development, Education, Agiculture, Horticulture, Animal Husbandry & Vety. Sciences, Fisheries, Social Welfare, Health & Family Welfare, Lead District Manager, DUDO, Commerce & Industries, PHE, PWD, DCSO, CDPO leh VC leh YMA hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SERCHHIP-AH BANA KAIH (PHASE-II) CM SPECIAL PACKAGE GRANT SEM| KALPHUNG INHRILHNA HUN HMAN A NI BAWK
content:
617/2026-2027

Dated Serchhip, the 20th May 2026:Vawiin khan Bana Kaih (Phase-II) hnuaia Chief Minister's Special Package Grant semna leh Progress Partners-te kalphung inhrilhhriatna hun DC Pisapui Hall-ah hman a ni a. Serchhip District Bawrhsap leh District Level Monitoring Committee Chairman ni bawk Pu Paul L. Khuma’n Khuallian niin hun a hmanpui a, DLMC Member Secretary, SDO (Sadar) Pi Rebecca Laldinmawii Hrahsel chuan vawiin hun hi a kaihruai a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Paul L. Khuma chuan Progress Partners kalkhawmte chu hmasawnna duhawm tak neia, ‘Success Story’ tha tak tak neih tum theuh turin a fuih a. Department hotute pawh theih tawp chhuah tur leh an Progress Partners theuhte thahnemngaihpui tura chahin duhsakna a hlan bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian DLMC Member Secretary Pi Rebecca Laldinmawii Hrahsel hnen atangin report ngaihthlak a ni a. Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pu Chawngthu Lalrinhlua’n Bana Kaih Phase-II chungchang sawizauna a nei bawk a; Concerned Departments hotuten thusawina hun hmang bawkin, DIPR Serchhip lamin Serchhip District-a Bana Kaih hlawhtlinpuitute Success Story an chhuah bawk a ni.

Tun dinhmunah Serchhip District chu Mizorama Progress Partners ngah ber dawttu niin, Aizawl District dawttu an ni mek a. Phase-I ah Progress Partners 135 neiin, Phase-II ah hian mi 49 an awm mek. Commerce & Industry Department hnuaiah mi 29 awmin an tam ber a, Agriculture Department hnuaiah mi 12, Fisheries Department hnuaiah mi 3, Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Department hnuaiah mi 2 awmin, Soil & Water Conservation Department, Urban Development & Poverty Alleviation (UD&PA) Department leh Social Welfare Department hnuaiahte mi 1 theuh an awm a; Direct Benefit Transfer system hmangin CM Special Package Grant-te hi anmahni Bank Account-ah theuh thunsak an ni dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: Ni thum chhung awh 'Hands-on workshop on 16s rRNA & Bacterial Whole Genome Analysis’ Zoram Medical College and Hospital-ah hmang tan
content:
616/2026-2027

Falkawn the 20th May, 2026:Vawiin May Ni 20, 2026 hian Department of Microbiology, Zoram Medical College and Hospital, Falkawn buatsaih, ni 3 chhung awh tur training 'Hands-on workshop on 16s rRNA & Bacterial Whole Genome Analysis’ chu hawnna hun hman a ni a. He Workshop ah hian, Oneomics, India, Pvt. Ltd leh C-DAC (Centre for Development of Advanced Computing) Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Govt of India atangin Expert ten training an neih pui ang.

He Workshop hi Mizoram University Vice Chancellor, Prof. Dibakar Chandra Deka chuan hawnna hun a rawn hmang a, Director leh ZMC&H hotu dangten an telpui bawk a ni.

He workshop ah hian natna hrik genes lak chhuah dan (genome sequence data analysis) an zir dawn a, hei hian damlo enkawl nan antibiotics tha ber thlanna kawngah a pui thei dawn a ni.

title: World Bee Day hmang
content:
615/2026-2027

20th May, 2026:Khadi leh Village Industries Commission, Aizawl State Office chuan vawiin khan Zomuansanga School-ah World Bee Day an hmang.

KVIC Honey Mission hnuaiah hian eizawnna atana khuai khawi leh khawizu siam inzirtir tum a ni a. Khuai khawia eizawnna hian ecological balance, agriculture leh biodiversity a humhalh dawn avangin eizawnna ngelnghet atana a pawimawhzia zirlai te zirtir an ni.

He programme ah hian Dr. Vineet Chaturvedi, Director, KVIC, Aizawl leh Pi Zodinpuii, Assistant Director, KVIC, Aizawl te chuan World Bee Day pawimawhna leh a thiltumte an sawifiah a. Pi Rebecca Lalbiakngheti, SMS (Plant Protection), KVK chuan PowerPoint hmangin khuai khawi leh enkawl dan te, khawizu siam dan te leh agriculture leh ecosystem humhalhna atana khawizu pawimawhna a zirtir a. Dr. Zosangpuii, SMS (Vety.), KVK pawhin khawizu leh apiculture inzawm eizawnna te a sawifiah a ni.

Zirlai te zingah World Bee Day leh khawizu humhalh chungchang thupui hmangin lemziak intihsiakna buatsaih a ni a. Sawihona hun hman a ni bawk.

He programme hi Pu Safiyan Hayath, Executive, KVIC, Aizawl chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Attachment

title: Health Minister Pi Lalrinpuiin Online Medical Referral System a tlangzarh
content:
614/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 20th May, 2026:Vawiin chawhma khan Health & Family Welfare Department changtu Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan, mipuite tana healthcare service leh sawrkar hnathawh tihchak zualna turin, Online Medical Referral chu SAD Conference Hall, MINECO-ah a tlangzarh.

Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan Online-a Medical refer awlsam taka Health & Family Department hnuaia  tih theih a ni ta mai chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Digital hmalakna-te hi healthcare governance tih changtlunna leh mipuite tana kawng awlsam leh hmalakna tha zawk  thlenna kawnga hmasawnna pawimawh tak a ni tih sawiin, Online system hi document dahṭhat nan te, information inpek nan te leh awlsam zawka mipuite dawrna kawngah hmang ṭangkai turin kalkhawmte a chah a. Tunlai khawvel thiamna (digital) hmangin MUHCS online registration pawh awlsam taka tih theih  a nih thu sawiin, tun dinhmunah chhungkaw 46,000 chuang an in register tawh thu a sawi bawk.

Minister Pi Lalrinpuii chuan medical officer te chak taka hmala zel turin a chah a, "He Online Medical Referral System hi a nihna tur tak a hman a nihtheih nan kan hnathawhna ah tihtakzet leh tha thlah loa kan thawh a ngai" tih sawiin, emergency refer atan a ṭangkai tur thu leh a viltuten an vil hneh a ngaih thu a sawi bawk. Health & Family Department hnuaiah hmalakna thar tam tak a awm a, hengte hi hmang ṭangkai tur chuan Health Department hnuaia Officer-te theihtawp an chhuah a, district tina CMO ten ṭan an lak a, an hnathawh an pholan thiam a ṭul tiin he Department a thawktute a chah.

Health & Family Welfare Department, Commissioner leh Secretary Pi K Lalrinzuali chuan he thil an tihlawhtling thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, "Vawiin hi kan department leh Mizoram mipuite tan Ni chhinchiahthlak tak a ni" a ti.

He Online System hi State-a digital governance leh healthcare infrastructure tih chak zualna kawnga hmasawnna pawimawh tak  a ni dawn a ni.

Health & Family Welfare Department buatsaih Online Medical Referral System tlangzarh-na programme ah hian MSeGS Project Manager Pu Isaac Zothanpuia'n technical report pein, portal hmandan tlangpui a tarlang a. Hospital & Medical Education, Health & Family Welfare, Director Dr Zonunmawii Pachuau chuan lawmthu sawiin he hun hi a khar a ni.

Online Medical Referral System chungchang:

Mizoram Sorkar chuan mipui hriselna ngai pawimawhin, damlo enkawlna kawnga harsatna awm te zirchiangin, siamthat dan tur a ngaihtuah a. Damlo na tak, Mizoram pawna enkawl ngai te tan referral kal phung, awlsam zawk leh mipuite tana rang zawka tih dan tur a ngaihtuah a. Damlo phaia refer a bik takin, Aizawl District pawna awm te tan, hun khawh ral lo leh an refer-na hmun rang taka an thlen theih nan, Directorate of Hospital & Medical Education (DHME) leh Mizoram State e-Governance Society (MSeGS) te ṭangkawpin Online Referral System an rawn duang chhuak a ni.

Medical Referral Board hi tun dinhmunah, Aizawl leh Lungleiah chiah awm in, Medical Referral Board-in a recommend te chu an thawhna Department aṭanga Forwarding lehkha nen DHME-ah provisional permission dil a ngai ṭhin a. Hei hi damlo tan a buaithlakin, hun tam tak khawh ral  ṭhin a ni.

Tunah chuan District Hospital tinah District Screening Committee (DSC) din ni tawhin, phaia damlo refer ngai te an awmna district DSC te’n lo zirchiangin, Medical Referral Board (Aizawl & Lunglei)-te nen video conferencing hmangin recommendation an siam tawh anga; chu recommendation chu DHME-ah kal kher ngai lovin, phone emaw personal computer emaw aṭangin linkmedicalreferralmizoram.inah lutin online hmanga permission hi cheng 20 chawiin dil tur a ni.

He Online Referral Portal hi Sorkar hnathawk-te tana siam a ni a, an department thawhna aṭanga forwarding letter leh board lehkha nen upload mai tur a ni. Provisional permission nen hian, Mizoram State Health Care Society (MSHCS)-ah in-report leh tur a ni. Sorkar hnathawk nilo (MUHCS beneficiaries - General) te chu MUHCS-ah medical board lehkha nen in report tur a ni thung. Final permission hi document enfel a ngaih avangin, DHME-ah damlo emaw an chhungte emaw office hun chhunga kalin lak chhuah theih a ni ang.

Harsatna nei chuan office hunchhungin phone no.6909319420ah hian biak pawh theih reng a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT LEVEL TASK FORCE IMMUNISATION THUKHAWM
content:
613/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 20th May  2026 :Vawiin chhun dar 1:00  PM khan DC Conference Hall - ah 'Lawngtlai District Level Task Force on Immunization'  chuan an Chairman leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin thutkhawm an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Natna darh tur ven kawngah te, thihna tihlem kawngah te, Naupang hriselna thleng kawngah leh mipui nawlpui tana hriselna thazawk thlen turin a hun taka mumal taka Vaccine - lâk a pawimawh tak zet a ti a. A bik takin   Lawngtlai District chu a zauin khua pawh a tam hle a,  inkalpawhna kawng a tha lo leh thawktu indaih lohna lo awm bawk nen immunisation- ah sang a har hle a,chutih rualin theih tawpa hmalak a ngai a ni, a ti. Lawngtlai District chhunga cheng mipuiten hriselna tha zawk an neih theihna tur leh natna hrik umbo kawngah theihtawp chhuah zel a nih tur thu tarlangin, District Administration - chuan chak zawka hmalak a lak zel tur thu a sawi bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian Dr.Remlalnghaki, DIO chuan April 2025 - March 2026 chhunga Lawngtlai District - a Immunization kalpui dan tlangpui tarlanna a nei a. Report atanga a lan danin, Routine Immunization Coverage - ah Bualpui NG chu 115.3 % niin a sang bera, Vaseitlang 39.4 % chu a hniam ber an ni thung a ni. MR1 Vaccine  - ah Bualpui NG 115.4 % niin a sang  ber a, Bungtlang 39.1 % niin a  hniam ber a, MR2 Vaccine- ah  Borapansury 115.6 % niin a sang ber a, Vaseitlang 74.4 % niin a hmiam ber thung  a ni.  HPV Vaccine - ah hian Lawngtlai District - ah Target-  1181 awmin Vaccine la - 499 an awm a ni. National Immunization Day - chu 1st Round, 1st July 2026 leh 2nd Round - 23rd September 2026 ah hman tur a ni a, hetah hian Lawngtlai District - ah Vaccine pek tur Target - 12,140 a awm a ni.

Pu James Zarzoliana, STS  hnen atangin NTEP kalpui dan tlangpui ngaihthlak a ni a. Kum 2026 bikah TB patient - 50 awmin Thi - 2 an awm a ni. Ni 24, March 2026  - 19th May 2026 chhung khan 'TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyaan' kalpui niin, Vulnerable Screened - 1833, X- Ray Screened - 1442, leh  NAAT tested - 123 kalpui niin, MTB- 0 a ni.

Thutkhawmah hian thil pawimawh tak tak sawiho a ni a. RI, MR1, R2 leh  HPV Vaccination- ah hlawhtlinna tan tak awm tawh mahse,  tan lak thar a tul hle tih pawm tlangin, theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel ni se an ti a. A bik takin HPV Vaccination - ah Target - 1181 awmah Vaccine la mi - 499 chauah an awm chu a tawklo hle tih pawmin, hemi bik atan hian theihtawp chhuaha hmalak thar ni se an ti a ni. 1st July leh 23rd September 2026- a National Immunization Day hman tura Sawrkarlaipuiin ruahmnna a siam chu Lawngtlai District- ah pawh hman ve ngei ni se an ti a. Hemi Ni denchhena naupang Kum - 5 hnuailam  Vaccine pek tur Target - 12,140 awm chu tihhlawhtlin ngei ni se tiin, hemi atan hian ruahmanna felfai tak siam  ni se an ti bawk a ni.

Bawrsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte chungah  lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm  a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial BLO-te tan Special Intensive Revision chungchanga hriattur pawimawh inzirtirna hun neih a ni
content:
612/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 20th May, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC Conference Hall-ah Special Intensive Revision (SIR) chhungchanga hriattur inzirtirna chu Hnahthial District chhunga Booth Level Office (BLO)-te bakah Supervisors leh Assistant BLO-te tan neih a ni a. District Election Officer (DEO) leh Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pi K.Vanlalruati chuan he huna rawn kalkhawmte chu uluk leh dik taka thawk a, District dangte entawntlak khawpa an hmachhawpte hlenchhuak turin a chah a ni.

DEO, Pi K.Vanlalruati chuan SIR chu roll revision satliah a nih loh thu sawiin roll revision pangngaia an tih ngai loh, in tin tlawh chhuah - House to House visit chu neih a nih tur thu a sawi a. Electoral roll-a awm sa chu rin tawp theih a nih tawh dawn loh avangin Enumeration form pawh in tinah semchhuah a tul tawh tur thu leh BLO te pawh tum dang aiin a hah deuh tur thu a sawi bawk. Hei vang hian BLO te chu roll revision dang aia an tan nasat a tul thu sawiin District dang entawntlak ni thei tura hma la theuh turin a chah a ni.

ERO leh leh Addl DC ni bawk, Pu Zothanmawia Khiangte chuan BLO kalkhawmte chu mi rintlak leh taima, tan bik ni lo tura ngaihte an nih thu sawiin chuvang tak chuan inlainatna avanga dik lo deuhva roll-a mi thun luh an awm loh a beisei thu a sawi a. SIR-ah chuan form thar siam a nih thu leh state dangah pawh roll atanga paih an tam thu sawiin chiang lo deuhva a hma a e-roll a lo lut emaw, dan ang taka e-roll a chuang thei lo tur emaw chu an hming paih hreh lo turin a chah nghal a ni.

Election Officer leh SDO (Sadar) ni bawk, Pu S. Kaptluanga chuan training an koh chhan ang ngeiin kalkhawmte chu an thiam loh te zawh hreh hauh lo turin a chah a. Inthlanna dik leh felfai awm tur chuan e-roll dik leh felfai kan neih phawt a tul thu sawiin chu mawhphurhna chu he huna kalkhawmte kutah a awm thu a sawi a ni.

SIR chungchanga hriattur pawimawh inzirtirna hi Master Trainer pahnih – Pi Christina Lalnunfeli, BDO leh Pu Lawrence Lalhlanthara, AERO/SDC te chuan an nei a ni.

Hnahthial District-ah hian Polling Station sawmhnih leh pasarih (27) awmin vawiin training-ah hian heng Polling station tana BLO theuhte chu kim takin an kal a. BLO bakah hian Supervisor pali (4) awmin Assistant BLO sawm leh pasarih (17) an awm bawk a ni.

Special Intensive Revision hi ngawrh taka kalpui chhoh tan tur niin ruahman lawk dan chuan May ni 20 atanga May ni 29 thleng hian Training leh inbuatsaihna hrang hrangte kalpui tan a ni ang a. BLO te hian May ni 30 atanga June ni 28 thleng hian Enumeration form sem leh lakkhawmna hun neiin, House to House Visit an nei dawn a ni. Draft Electoral Roll hi July ni 5, 2026 ah tlangzarh a ni ang a, Final Electoral roll hi September ni 6, 2026 –ah tlangzarh a ni ang.

Tun SIR-ah hian 01.07.2026 –a kum 18 tling chinte tan e-roll ah inziah luh theih a ni ang.

Attachment

title: PWD Minister Pu Vanlalhlana hovin Mizoram Road Fund Board Thukhawm
content:
611/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, 20th May, 2026:Mizoram Road Fund Board chu vawiin khan Secretariat Conference Hall-I, MINECO-ah board chairman PWD Minister Pu Vanlalhlana hovin an thukhawm.

Meeting-ah hian kum 2025-26 chhunga Mizoram Road Fund Board in kawng leh lei siam hnathawhna tur a lo pawm tawh atanga hna thawh te thlirletna neiin, kum 2026-27 chhunga sum hmanna tur chu chhawpchhuah leh sawiho a ni bawk. Nitin kawng/kawngpui enkawlna hna (Normal/Routine maintenance of roads), kawng siamna tur; bituminous pavement leh cement/concrete construction, side drain, retaining wall, cross drainage leh thil tul dangte siamna tur (Annual Maintenance Operation Plan), PMGSY siam zawh tawh te enkawlzui na tur (Maintenance of completed PMGSY Roads), lei thawm that ngai zual te siamthatna tur (Maintenance of Bridges), Mizoram sawrkarin tha zawk leh felfai zawka kawngte enkawlna leh vilna tur (Road Assets Management System (RAMS), fur ruahtuiin a thlen thin leimin leh side drain/culvert block thenfaina tur (Moonsoon Damage Repair), kawng hmangtute himna tur leh chetsualna pumpelh theih nana hmalakna tur (Road Safety Measures) atana a chhawpchhuah cheng nuai 8325 chu pawm a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Mizoram Road Fund Board member sawrkar department hotute leh NGO hrang hrang aiawh an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MOTHER'S DAY PUALIN KOLASIB-AH NU CHHUANAWM TE CHAWIMAWINA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
610/2026-2027

Kolasib, 20th May, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Office Chamber, Kolasib-ah Mother's Day pualin District Hub for Empowerment of Women (DHEW), Women & Child Development (WCD) buatsaihin nu chhuanawm te chawimawina hun hman a ni. He hun hi Pi Lalnunpari Hmar, District Programme Officer i/c, WCD chuan a kaihruai a ni.

He hunah hian Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thusawina hun hmangin, tunlai khawvela fa enkawl seilen a hautak zia leh harsat ziate a sawi a. Tunlai hunah chuan thalaite zingah ruihtheihthil ti lo ringawt pawh fa fel nia ngaih theih an nih tawh laia, fa nungchang tha leh hlawhtling tak tak an chher chhuak thei chu ropui a tih thu leh lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.  Fate rual awhna tam tak karah  theihpatawpa an mamawh phuhru thintu, nu hmangaihna leh inpekna chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

DC chuan, tunlai kan society-ah sualna tam tak a hluar mek a, chumi kara nu in fa hlawhtling tak a chher chhuak thei chu thil namai lo tak a ni a ti a. Hmeichhe tha leh tha lo tehfung hrang hrangte sawiin, chawimawina dawngtu nute chu hmeichhe tha leh entawn tlak an nih thu sawiin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

He chawimawina thilpek hi Kolasib district chhunga hmeichhia, pasal te tel lova fa hlawhtling tak tak enkawl seiliantu nu (single mothers) te hnenah pek a ni a. Chawimawina dawngtu te chu:

1. Pi Nuzawni

2. Pi K. Zosangliani

3. Pi H. Lalsangpuii

Vawiina chawimawina hun hmanah hian MHIP Kolasib Sub-Headquarters hruaitute leh chawimawina dawngtu chhungte an tel a. He hun hi Pi Elizabeth Lalmuankimi, District Mission Coordinator, DHEW chuan lawmthu sawiin a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWLAH BANA KAIH CM SPECIAL PACKAGE SEM CHHUAHNA HUN HMANG
content:
609/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 20th May, 2026 :Vawiin khan Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana, District Monitoring Committee Chairman ni bawk kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah Bana kaih scheme hnuaia CM Special Package dawng tura thlan mi 10 hnenah certificate leh placard semna hun hman a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Khawzawl dsitrict chhunga department hrang hrangte chu hna an thawk tha-in mipuite pawh an taima a tih thu a sawi a. Vawiina CM Special Package dawngtute chu tanpuina an dawn dinchhuahpui thei khawpa hmang tangkai turin leh theihtawp chhuah turin a chah.

Vawiin inkhawmah hian SDC Pu R. Lalrinhlua hnen atangin Bana kaih chungchang leh scheme thil tumte ngaihthak a ni a. DRDO RAO Pu F. Malsawmtluanga chuan sumdawnna-a sum leh pai enkawl dan zirtirna a pe bawk a. Khawzawl Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana leh line department hotute pawh an tel a ni.

title: CHIEF MINISTER’S CHARITABLE TRUST BOARD OF TRUSTEES HOLDS ANNUAL MEETING
content:
94/2026-2027

Aizawl, 20 May 2026:The Board of Trustees of the Chief Minister’s Charitable Trust, chaired by Chief Minister Shri Lalduhoma, held its Annual Meeting today at the Chief Minister’s Office.

During the meeting, the Board agreed to open the Chief Minister’s Charitable Trust for use by Government Departments, Societies, NGOs, and individuals as a channel for receiving Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) support.

The Annual Meeting reviewed the Trust’s financial status for the previous year and appointed the Trust Auditor and Pro Bono Advisor for the Financial Year 2025–26. Smt R. Lalrodingi was appointed as Chief Executive Officer of the Board, while Shri Raymond Lalmuanate was appointed as Secretary.

The Board also stressed the importance of obtaining registration under the Foreign Contribution Regulation Act (FCRA) to enable the Trust to legally receive donations from abroad, and resolved to pursue the matter.

The meeting further agreed to collaborate wherever possible with the Mizoram Corporate Social Responsibility Cell (CSR Cell).

It was also decided that Government Departments under the Mizoram Government requiring an implementing agency for CSR projects may utilise the Chief Minister’s Charitable Trust for that purpose. Likewise, Societies, NGOs, and individuals who receive CSR support and require an implementing agency may also engage the Trust.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER'S CHARITABLE TRUST BOARD OF TRUSTEES THUKHAWM
content:
608/2026-2027

Aizawl the 20th May 2026:Vawiin khan Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma kaihhruaiin Chief Minister's Charitable Trust Board of Trustees te chuan CM Office-ah Annual Meeting an nei a. Chief Minister's Charitable Trust chu Department, Society, NGOs leh mimal pawhin CSR dawnthleng atana an hman theih tura inhawn an remti.

Board of Trustees Annual Meeting hian kum kalta chhunga an sum dinhmun an thlirlet a, Financial Year 2025-26 atana Trust Auditor tur leh Pro Bono Advisor tur an ruat a. Board Chief Executive Officer atan Pi R. Lalrodingi leh Secretary atan Pu Raymond Lalmuanate chu an ruat.

Ram pawn atanga dan ang taka tanpuina (Donation) dawn theihna Foreign Contribution Regulation Act (FCRA) registration neih tha an ti a. Hmalak zui a ni ang. Mizoram Corporate Social Responsibility Cell (CSR Cell) nena thawh dun theihna awm apianga thawh dun an remti bawk.

Mizoram sorkara Department hrang hrangten CSR dil chhuah an neih changa Implementing Agency an mamawhin Chief Minister's Charitable Trust hi Agency-ah an hmang thei ang.

Chutiang bawkin, Society, NGO leh mimalin CSR an hmuha Agency an mamawh chuan he Trust hi hman theih a ni bawk ang.

Chief Minister's Charitable Trust-ah hian Pu Lalduhoma, Chief Minister chu Settlor a ni a, Pu Vanlaldina Fanai, Secretary to CM leh Pu David Lalthantluanga, Secretary, P&PI te chu ex- officio Trustee an ni.

Attachment

title: Lawngtlaiah DCC, DLRC leh DLSC for the Quarter ending March 2026 leh Special DCC for 2026- 2027 an ṭhukhawm
content:
607/2026-2027

Dated Lawngtlai, 20th May 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan Lawngtlai District Consultative Committee (DCC), District Level Review Committee (DLRC) leh District Level Security Committee (DLSC) for the Quarter Ending May, 2026 chu Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii SDO (S)  kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhukhawm.

Pi Margaret J. Vanlalremmawii chuan Bank hrang hrang aiawh lokalte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. A bik takin sawrkarin Scheme emaw programme - a kalpuiahte chak zawka loan pek chhuah a pawimawh hle tiin, hemi kawnga ngaihtuahna thar nei turin a chah a. Mipuiten hamthatna an neih hrang hrang an hriat zung zung theihna tur leh bank dawr kawngah harsatna an tawh lohna tura Financial Literally Campaign (FLC) ngaipawimawh thar turin a fuih a. Bank- te chu FLC nei ngei ngei thin tura chahin, a tul dan ang a sawrkar line department hrang hrangte nena thawkho thiam turin a chah a. SDO (S) chuan Bank - te chu Lawngtlai mipuiten an dawr nasa tih hriaa, mipuite lo dawngsawng thiam fo thin turin a ngen nghal bawk.

He ṭhutkhawmah hian Lead Bank Office-a Lead District Manager (Lawngtlai & Siaha) Pu JM Soren leh Reserve Bank of India (RBI) aiawh bakah, bank hrang hrang leh line department ai awhte an tel a ni.

He hunah hian meeting hmasa, February  ni 2, 2026-a DCC meeting minute chu pawm a ni a. Kum 2025 chhunga Lawngtlai District-a bank hrang hrangte hna thawh thlir let niin, hmachhawp an neih leh hma lak zui dan tur te sawi ho nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Financial Unclusion Plan (FIP) hnuaiah Lawngtlai District chhunga mihring 2,000 chunglam chenna khaw tinah mipuiin bank kal tlanga hamṭhatna hrang hrang an chhawr ve theih nan an khuaah bank branch emaw, business correspondent emaw, Indian Postal Payment Bank emaw dah tura hma lakna kalpui mek a nih thu leh tun dinhmunah Lawngtlai District chhungah Bank Branch- 12, ATM Booth -8, Business correspondent- 84,Financial Literacy Centre- 1, leh Indian Postal Payment Bank-1, a awm mek thu tar lan a ni a. January - March 2026 chhunga khan  bank hrang hrang, Lead Bank leh CFL kal tlangin mipui hnena sum hman leh enkawl dan inzirtirna (financial literacy campaign) ṭum- 70 buatsaih a nih thu tar lan niin, line department-te nena ṭang hovin bank-te'n FLC tam zawk buatsaih turin hma lak chhunzawm se, tih a ni.

Pawisa dah hmasa lo (zero balance)-a account hawn theihna, Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) leh social security scheme hrang hrang - Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY), Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) etc. lama bank hma lak dan te thlir ho niin, mipui tam zawkin he'ng hamṭhatnate hi an chhawr theih nan ṭan lak lehzual ni se, tih a ni a. Bank-a mipuiin sum an dah luh (deposit) zat za zela bank-in mipuia sum an puktir (credit) zat chhutna, Credit/Deposit Ratio-ah Lawngtlai District-a bank-te chuanarch  2026-ah CD Ratio 108.88% an nei tih tar lan a ni a, December 2025 (120. 90%) nen khaikhinin CD Ratio hi 12. 02 %-in a thlahniam  a ni.

Kum 2025-2026 sawrkar kum chhunga Lawngtlai District chhunga bank-te'n loan an pek chhuah dan tur, Annual Credit Plan (ACP) ruahman atangin March 2026 thleng khan bank-te hian Priority Sector hnuaiah 100.43 % leh Non- Proirity Sector hnuaiah 296.77 % loan an pe chhuak tawh a ni. March , 2026 thleng khan PMEGP hnuaiah loan nuai 88.53  hu pek niin, DAY- NRLM/ MzSLRM - ah nuai 288.97, PMMY - ah nuai 618.07 leh KCC loan nuai 1851.90 hu pek chhuah a ni.

He hunah hian kum 2026-2027 chhunga Lawngtlai District chhunga bank-te'n loan an pek chhuah dan tur, Annual Credit Plan (ACP) ruahmanna an neih chu chu thlir ho a ni a. Bank leh mipui sum vawn himna (security) lam te leh pawisa leng vel (currency management & remittance) chungchang bakah Bank zawng zawngten quarter tawp atanga ni 15 chhung ngei a FLC data submit ni se tih an rel  a. Bank Branch zawng zawnga awm ngei ngei tur - Security Guards,  CCTV, Fire Extinguisher leh Security Alarm- te chu ngaihpawimawh thar ni se an ti bawk.

Attachment
